article.title: Multiple small Tennessee counties pass temporary data center bans — Nashville also passed near-unanimous moratorium on first reading
article.summary: Two jurisdictions in Tennessee just passed a data center moratorium as three more a set to vote on bills that delay these projects. These temporary bans have gained widespread support, especially in rural regions where developers are increasingly looking to for building their massive projects.
article.title_zh: 田納西州多個小縣通過數據中心臨時禁令 — 納什維爾也在首讀中通過近乎全票的禁令
article.summary_zh: 田納西州的兩個司法管轄區剛剛通過了數據中心暫停令，另有三個地區將投票表決延遲這些項目的法案。這些臨時禁令獲得了廣泛支持，特別是在開發商越來越多尋求建設大型項目的農村地區。

article.title: China's supreme court bans Infineon from selling GaN power chips in China — market-leader Innoscience secures major victory in multi-region patent war
article.summary: China's Supreme People's Court on Friday upheld an injunction prohibiting Infineon from selling disputed GaN products in mainland China.
article.title_zh: 中國最高法院禁止英飛凌在華銷售 GaN 功率芯片 — 市場領導者 Innoscience 在多地專利戰爭中取得重大勝利
article.summary_zh: 中國最高人民法院週五維持了禁止英飛凌在中國大陸銷售爭議 GaN 產品的禁令。

article.title: UK becomes the latest country to ban social media apps for kids
article.summary: A growing number of countries around the world are enacting bans or restrictions on the use of social media apps by children. The UK has just announced its own plan to join the list, with a comprehensive ban set to be introduced early next year …
article.title_zh: 英國成為最新禁止兒童使用社群媒體應用的國家
article.summary_zh: 全球越來越多國家正在制定禁令或限制兒童使用社群媒體應用。英國剛宣布加入這份名單，全面禁令將在明年初推出。

article.title: UK government announces social media ban for those under 16
article.summary: Today, the UK government has announced that it's going to ban the use of social media for children under 16. The ban will include Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, and X, but won't include messaging apps like WhatsApp and Signal. The UK government will also (somehow) restrict "harmful functions" like live streaming and "stranger communication with children". These restrictions will apply to a wider range of online services, not just social media - gaming sites are included, for example. These restrictions will apply to those under 17. AI "romantic companion" chatbots...
article.title_zh: 英國政府宣佈禁止 16 歲以下使用社交媒體
article.summary_zh: 英國政府宣佈將禁止 16 歲以下兒童使用 Snapchat、TikTok、YouTube、Instagram、Facebook 和 X 等社交媒體，但不包括 WhatsApp 和 Signal 等消息應用。

article.title: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous’ US government ban on Anthropic’s most powerful models
article.summary: A group made up of dozens of cybersecurity experts urged the White House to remove export control restrictions on Anthropic’s models Fable and Mythos, arguing that the order is going to limit the ability of cybersecurity defenders to secure their software and products.
article.title_zh: 網絡安全專家抗議美國政府禁止 Anthropic 最強大模型的「危險」政策
article.summary_zh: 數十名網絡安全專家敦促白宮撤銷對 Anthropic 的 Fable 和 Mythos 模型的出口管制，認為此舉將限制網絡安全防衛者保護其軟體和產品的能力。

article.title: The UK Places a Sweeping Ban on Social Media for Kids Under 16
article.summary: The UK government is introducing a ban on social media for children and a minimum age for some chatbots in an attempt to shield young people from dangerous corners of the web.
article.title_zh: 英國對 16 歲以下兒童使用社交媒體實施全面禁令
article.summary_zh: 英國政府推出針對兒童的社交媒體禁令和某些聊天機器人的最低年齡限制，試圖保護年輕人免受網絡危害。

article.title: UK Seeks One of World’s Strictest Social Media Bans for Kids
article.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced what he described as a “full ban” on children using social media, going beyond limits imposed by Australia last year to create one of the strictest online crackdowns in the democratic world.
article.title_zh: 英國尋求對兒童實施世界上最嚴格的社交媒體禁令
article.summary_zh: 首相 Keir Starmer 宣布對兒童使用社交媒體的 '完全禁令'，超越澳洲去年實施的限制，成為民主世界最嚴格的網絡管制之一。

article.title: Anthropic Block Marks US Reversal, Warning to Silicon Valley
article.summary: The extraordinary move by the US to bar foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s best AI models underscores the Trump administration’s newfound willingness to exert control over a pivotal industry. It also reminds Silicon Valley that it’s working with an imperfectly understood technology with uncertain impact.
article.title_zh: Anthropic禁令標誌美國政策逆轉，對矽谷的警告
article.summary_zh: 美國採取非常措施限制外國使用Anthropic PBC最先進AI模型，突顯川普政府願意對此關鍵產業施加控制。

article.title: Carney Says Anthropic Ban Shows Risk of Relying on Big AI Models
article.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said the US export ban blocking all foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s latest artificial intelligence models underscores the risk of depending on just a handful of powerful AI tools.
article.title_zh: 卡尼表示Anthropic禁令顯示依賴大型AI模型的風險
article.summary_zh: 加拿大總理馬克·卡尼表示，美國出口禁令阻止所有外國使用Anthropic PBC最新AI模型，突顯仰賴少數強大AI工具的風險。

article.title: The UK’s big new social media ban should have under-16s everywhere feeling nervous
article.summary: TL;DR The United Kingdom has announced plans to ban children under 16 from social media by law. The UK’s forthcoming plan will be modeled on Australia’s, which requires platforms to verify users’ ages or face fines. Restrictions could take effect as soon as early 2027. The UK intends to ban young kids from social media. Under a newly announced initiative, starting early next year, social media platforms including YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, X, and more will need to verify that their UK users are 16 or older, with potential fines for failing to comply. The plan was announced today in a press release , as well as on Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s YouTube channel and Substack . The UK’s plan is modeled on Australia’s ban that came into force last year and similarly bars children unde
article.title_zh: 英國的大型社交媒體禁令應該讓全世界 16 歲以下人士感到緊張
article.summary_zh: 英國宣布計畫通過法律禁止 16 歲以下兒童使用社交媒體，將以澳洲模式為藍本，限制措施可能於 2027 年初生效。

article.title: The US government’s Anthropic models ban was never about an AI jailbreak
article.summary: The Trump administration's decision that forced Anthropic to pull its latest cybersecurity models could be reactionary, retaliatory, or both, but the message is clear: The AI industry isn't immune from U.S. government interference.
article.title_zh: 美國政府的 Anthropic 模型禁令從未與 AI 越獄相關
article.summary_zh: 川普政府迫使 Anthropic 下架最新網路安全模型的決定可能出於反動或報復目的，但訊息很明確：AI 產業並非不受美國政府干預的保護。

article.title: UK to ban social media for kids under 16, may impose overnight curfews
article.summary: The UK government announced today that it will ban social media for all kids under the age of 16 in rules expected to take effect in spring 2027. The ban will apply to platforms including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, and X. "We’re going further than any country in the world by banning social media for under-16s and putting wider protections in place to give kids their childhood back," Prime Minister Keir Starmer said in the announcement. In addition to the ban on social media, Starmer's government said it will impose "world-leading blocks on harmful functions such as livestreaming and stranger communication with children for under-16s... Restrictions on these functionalities will also be on by default for 16- and 17-year-olds to prevent a cliff-edge at 16." The livestrea
article.title_zh: 英國禁止 16 歲以下兒童使用社交媒體，可能實施夜間宵禁
article.summary_zh: 英國政府宣布將禁止所有 16 歲以下兒童使用社交媒體，該規則預計於 2027 年春季生效，涵蓋 Snapchat、TikTok、YouTube、Instagram、Facebook 和 X 等平台。英國表示這是全球範圍內對青少年社交媒體使用的最嚴格禁令。

article.title: Fox’s $22B Roku acquisition aims to expand its reach into smart TVs, advertising
article.summary: Fox Corporation has agreed to buy Roku Inc. for $160 per share, an approximate enterprise value of $22 billion, the firms announced today. The acquisition would unite Fox’s broadcast channels, including Fox, Fox News, Fox Business, and FS1, as well as its streaming businesses, including Tubi, a free ad-supported streaming television (FAST) platform that Fox bought in 2020, with Roku’s own FAST service, The Roku Channel, and Roku’s streaming hardware business, including its streaming sticks and smart TVs. Roku says it has 100 million households using its platform. The most valuable part of Roku’s business isn't its hardware, which lost $19.1 million in the quarter ending March 31, 2026, but its the operating system (Roku OS) and advertising business. In that same quarter, Roku’s advertising
article.title_zh: Fox 220 億美元 Roku 收購旨在擴大其在智能電視和廣告領域的影響力
article.summary_zh: Fox Corporation 同意以每股 160 美元的價格收購 Roku Inc.，企業價值約為 220 億美元。此次收購將整合 Fox、Fox News、Fox Business 和 FS1 等 Fox 廣播頻道，以及 Tubi 等流媒體業務。

article.title: Meta’s new ‘AI Mode’ on Facebook pulls from public info across its platforms
article.summary: Meta announced Monday that it's rolling out a wave of new AI features on Facebook, the latest sign of the company's effort to catch up in the AI race and keep users more engaged on the platform.
article.title_zh: Meta 在 Facebook 上推出新的「AI Mode」，從其平台的公開資訊中獲取內容
article.summary_zh: Meta 周一宣布在 Facebook 上推出一波新的 AI 功能，是該公司努力在 AI 競賽中追上並提高用戶平台參與度的最新跡象。

article.title: Google announces $1.5 billion Alabama data center expansion, says it’s covering energy costs
article.summary: Plans to expand Google’s data center in Jackson County, Alabama, are underway with a $1.5 billion investment from the company. Google says energy costs will be covered by the company and operations powered by nuclear energy, eventually.
article.title_zh: Google 宣布投資 15 億美元擴展阿拉巴馬州資料中心，表示將涵蓋能源成本
article.summary_zh: Google 正在投資 15 億美元擴展其在阿拉巴馬州傑克遜縣的資料中心。Google 表示能源成本將由公司承擔，最終由核能驅動運營。

article.title: FBI dismantles Chinese phishing service that coached buyers to generate scam sites using AI —$88 cybercrime product linked to $1.9 billion in losses, 3.87 million stolen cards
article.summary: The FBI, Google, and Lumen Technologies say they’ve dismantled a China-based phishing-as-a-service operation called Outsider Enterprise.
article.title_zh: FBI 摧毀中國釣魚服務，該服務教導買家使用 AI 生成詐騙網站 — $88 網絡犯罪產品與 19 億美元損失和 387 萬張被盜卡相關
article.summary_zh: FBI、Google 和 Lumen Technologies 表示他們已摧毀了一個名為 Outsider Enterprise 的中國釣魚即服務（phishing-as-a-service）運營。

article.title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion
article.summary: Salesforce says it wants to use Fin's team and technology to improve Agentforce, its existing enterprise platform that businesses can use to build custom AI agents that automate tasks.
article.title_zh: Salesforce 以 36 億美元收購 AI 客服平台 Fin
article.summary_zh: Salesforce 計劃利用 Fin 的團隊和技術改進其企業平台 Agentforce，幫助企業建立自定義 AI 代理以自動化任務。

article.title: As AI agents become employees, NewCore emerges with $66M to give them identities
article.summary: NewCore argues the next challenge in enterprise security will be managing AI agents, not people.
article.title_zh: 隨著 AI 代理成為員工，NewCore 獲得 6,600 萬美元融資為其賦予身份
article.summary_zh: NewCore 認為企業安全的下一個挑戰將是管理 AI 代理而非人類員工。

article.title: Cohere sold sovereign AI to enterprises, now it’s targeting developers with its first coding model
article.summary: Canadian foundation model company Cohere has spent the past few years selling a specific idea to banks, governments, and healthcare providers: that AI should run on their infrastructure, under their control, with their data never leaving the perimeter. Cohere’s pitch went down well in regulated industries. Now the company is taking it to a different audience, with the launch of North Mini Code — its first coding model, released under an Apache 2.0 license from the get-go . Model access as infrastructure The sovereignty argument Cohere has long made to enterprise customers is, at its root, about ownership . Regulated industries have hard requirements: data can’t leave certain boundaries, and the intelligence layer running on sensitive infrastructure needs to be something t
article.title_zh: Cohere 向企業推售主權 AI，現開始瞄準開發者及首款編碼模型
article.summary_zh: 加拿大基礎模型公司 Cohere 過去數年向銀行、政府和醫療提供商推售主權 AI 概念，強調 AI 應在客戶基礎架構上運行、數據不離開安全邊界。該策略在受監管的行業中獲得良好迴響。

article.title: Salesforce to Buy AI Customer Service Firm Fin for $3.6 Billion
article.summary: Salesforce Inc. has agreed to buy Fin, a firm that develops artificial intelligence-powered customer agents, for about $3.6 billion as the software company works to win new business for enterprise AI.
article.title_zh: Salesforce 以 36 億美元收購 AI 客戶服務公司 Fin
article.summary_zh: Salesforce 同意以約 36 億美元收購開發人工智能客戶代理的 Fin，以爭奪企業 AI 業務。

article.title: What your logs can’t tell you when an AI agent acts alone
article.summary: For a long time, logs lived in a strange purgatory: technically required, rarely read, and mostly forgotten until something broke. The typical pattern looked like this: engineering teams would wire up logging because it was considered good practice, or because an auditor had it on a checklist. The logs got generated. They went somewhere — an S3 bucket, a Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) system, a flat file on a server — and then nobody looked at them. Not because teams were negligent, but because the logs weren’t built to be looked at. They were a dump. A timestamp and an event ID and a string of metadata that required real forensic patience to make sense of. The only time anyone went digging was after an incident. And that’s exactly when you’d
article.title_zh: 當 AI 代理獨立行動時，您的日誌無法告訴您什麼
article.summary_zh: 日誌長期處於尷尬境地：技術上必需但很少被閱讀，直到出現問題才被想起。工程團隊通常出於最佳實踐或審計清單要求而設置日誌記錄。

article.title: OpenRouter推出Fusion，以多模型協作提升AI研究能力
article.summary: AI模型路由平臺OpenRouter上周四（6/12）推出Fusion功能，可同時呼叫多個AI模型回答同一問題，再由另一模型整合成最終答案，並宣稱Fusion可在深度研究任務中產生比單一模型更完整的答案。
article.title_zh: OpenRouter推出Fusion，以多模型協作提升AI研究能力
article.summary_zh: AI模型路由平臺OpenRouter上周四（6/12）推出Fusion功能，可同時呼叫多個AI模型回答同一問題，再由另一模型整合成最終答案，並宣稱Fusion可在深度研究任務中產生比單一模型更完整的答案。

article.title: Fox just made a $22 billion play for your TV screen by buying Roku
article.summary: Credit: Roku TL;DR Fox Corporation is acquiring Roku in a cash-and-stock transaction valued at $160 per share, marking its largest digital expansion. The merger combines Fox’s Tubi and The Roku Channel, positioning the unified entity behind only YouTube and Netflix in US viewing time. The deal is expected to close in the first half of 2027, following regulatory approvals. The streaming landscape is in for a massive seismic shift. Fox Corporation announced that it is acquiring streaming giant Roku in a blockbuster deal valued at roughly $22 billion. The cash-and-stock transaction, which sees Fox paying $160 per share, marks the broadcasting giant’s biggest push into digital entertainment. For millions of viewers, the merger means two of the biggest hubs for free, ad-supported streaming, Fox
article.title_zh: Fox 以 220 億美元收購 Roku，搶占電視屏幕市場
article.summary_zh: Fox Corporation 以每股 $160 的現金和股票組合方式收購 Roku，是其最大的數位擴張舉措，合併後將在美國觀看時長排名中排名第三，僅次於 YouTube 和 Netflix。
